OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Modifies an individual application returned to constituents so that they can provide the required details again. Deletes existing document checklist items and creates new document checklist items. Creates a new assessment.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ModifyReturnedIndividualApplication

childElements.name: CreateDocumentChecklistItemForIncome
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContentDocumentId" : "=%TransformDataForDocumentChecklistItems:Income:AttachIncomeProofs:IncomeProofDocument:data%", "IndividualApplicationId" : "=%IndividualApplicationId%", "Name" : "=%TransformDataForDocumentChecklistItems:Income:AttachIncomeProofs:IncomeProofDocument:filename%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSExpCloudNewDocumentChecklistItem1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: CreateDocumentChecklistItemForMemberDetail
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ContentDocumentId" : "=%TransformDataForDocumentChecklistItems:HouseholdInformation:AttachMemberDetailProofs:MemberDetailProofDocument:data%", "IndividualApplicationId" : "=%IndividualApplicationId%", "Name" : "=%TransformDataForDocumentChecklistItems:HouseholdInformation:AttachMemberDetailProofs:MemberDetailProofDocument:filename%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSExpCloudNewDocumentChecklistItem1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

childElements.name: DeleteDocumentChecklistItem
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "allOrNone" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "deleteSObject" : [ { "AllOrNone" : false, "Id" : "%FetchDocumentChecklistItems:DocumentChecklistItem:Id%", "Type" : "DocumentChecklistItem" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DeleteAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: FetchDocumentChecklistItems
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "IndividualApplicationId" : "=%IndividualApplicationId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchDocumentChecklistItems3", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: GetIndividualApplicationName
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSExpCloudFetchIndividualApplicationName1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "IndividualApplicationId", "inputParam" : "IndividualApplicationId" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "IndividualApplication", "responseJSONPath" : "IndividualApplication", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: Save-Responses
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "additionalInput" : { "ContextId" : "=%IndividualApplicationId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "remoteClass" : "omnistudio.StoreResponses", "remoteMethod" : "invokeMethod", "remoteOptions" : { "Assessment.AssessmentStatus" : "Completed", "Assessment.Name" : "%SetAssessmentName:AssessmentName%" }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: TransformDataForDocumentChecklistItems
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSReportCOCTransformDataForDocumentChecklistItems1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: UpdateIndividualApplicationStatus
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "IndividualApplicationId" : "=%IndividualApplicationId%", "IndividualApplicationStatus" : "=\"Submitted\"" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSUpdateIndividualApplicationStatus1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "description" : "", "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "labelPlural" : "", "labelSingular" : "", "linkToExternalObject" : "", "mockResponseMap" : { }, "nameColumn" : "", "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "rollbackOnError" : true, "trackingCustomData" : { }, "ttlMinutes" : 5 }
